summary: Exceptional audience recording with crystal‑clear sound captures a legendary Cow Palace performance highlighted by an electrifying second set.
review: The audience‑sourced tape is praised for its immersive, crisp clarity and vivid sense of being there, despite a minor whistling artifact.  Listeners repeatedly call the show one of the band’s all‑time greats, especially lauding the powerhouse second set, making this recording a must‑have for any Deadhead collection.

ai_rating.rationale: Average star rating is 4.5; reviews overwhelmingly highlight superb performance and excellent sound quality with consistent positive comments across many detailed entries.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear, immersive mix with good instrument separation; occasional whistler artifact noted but does not detract from overall listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a seamless, high‑energy show with an especially powerful second set that leaves listeners raving.
